title: Ondine Hall (PSU)
html: Stub. Portland State University residence hall in downtown Portland. Yahir stayed here during the YEBW (Young Entrepreneurs Business Week) high-school program in summer 2019 — first dated mention 2019 07 14 ondine hall. Notable as the first Portland address Yahir lived in in the vault, predating his OSU / Ford-era Portland trips.

related.label: Finish packing shit in morning — YEBW departure pep-talk
Ondine Hall — PSU dorm address logged for YEBW week
